testcase.name: test_leagues_returns_5_leagues

failure.message: AssertionError: Expected 5 leagues, got 7 assert 7 == 5 + where 7 = len([{'country': 'Italy', 'current_season': 2025, 'league_id': 135, 'logo': 'https://media.api-sports.io/football/leagues/135.png', ...}, {'country': 'England', 'current_season': 2025, 'league_id': 39, 'logo': 'https://media.api-sports.io/football/leagues/39.png', ...}, {'country': 'Spain', 'current_season': 2025, 'league_id': 140, 'logo': 'https://media.api-sports.io/football/leagues/140.png', ...}, {'country': 'Germany', 'current_season': 2025, 'league_id': 78, 'logo': 'https://media.api-sports.io/football/leagues/78.png', ...}, {'country': 'France', 'current_season': 2025, 'league_id': 61, 'logo': 'https://media.api-sports.io/football/leagues/61.png', ...}, {'country': 'Europe', 'current_season': 2025, 'league_id': 2, 'logo': 'https://media.api-sports.io/football/leagues/2.png', ...}, ...])

testcase.failure: backend/tests/test_statistics_api.py:65: in test_leagues_returns_5_leagues assert len(leagues) == 5, f"Expected 5 leagues, got {len(leagues)}" E AssertionError: Expected 5 leagues, got 7 E assert 7 == 5 E + where 7 = len([{'country': 'Italy', 'current_season': 2025, 'league_id': 135, 'logo': 'https://media.api-sports.io/football/leagues/135.png', ...}, {'country': 'England', 'current_season': 2025, 'league_id': 39, 'logo': 'https://media.api-sports.io/football/leagues/39.png', ...}, {'country': 'Spain', 'current_season': 2025, 'league_id': 140, 'logo': 'https://media.api-sports.io/football/leagues/140.png', ...}, {'country': 'Germany', 'current_season': 2025, 'league_id': 78, 'logo': 'https://media.api-sports.io/football/leagues/78.png', ...}, {'country': 'France', 'current_season': 2025, 'league_id': 61, 'logo': 'https://media.api-sports.io/football/leagues/61.png', ...}, {'country': 'Europe', 'current_season': 2025, 'league_id': 2, 'logo': 'https://media.api-sports.io/football/leagues/2.png', ...}, ...])

testcase.name: test_leagues_contains_expected_leagues

failure.message:
AssertionError: Expected leagues {39, 135, 140, 61, 78}, got {2, 3, 39, 135, 140, 78, 61} assert {2, 3, 39, 61, 78, 135, ...} == {39, 61, 78, 135, 140}
Extra items in the left set: 2 3
Full diff: {...
...Full output truncated (8 lines hidden), use '-vv' to show

testcase.failure: backend/tests/test_statistics_api.py:80: in test_leagues_contains_expected_leagues assert response_league_ids == expected_league_ids, f"Expected leagues {expected_league_ids}, got {response_league_ids}" E AssertionError: Expected leagues {39, 135, 140, 61, 78}, got {2, 3, 39, 135, 140, 78, 61} E assert {2, 3, 39, 61, 78, 135, ...} == {39, 61, 78, 135, 140} E E Extra items in the left set: E 2 E 3 E E Full diff: E {...
